Some of the areas that I am currently exploring include:

* [Biostatistics](https://hbiostat.org/bbr/): Clinical trial design, survival analysis, and causal inference in healthcare.

* Animal Nutrition: Predictive and prescriptive modeling for feed optimization and livestock management.

* [Causality in Electricity Markets](https://github.com/dcacciarelli/my-causality-book)

* Supply Chain Optimization: Demand forecasting, inventory management, and logistics optimization.


These are not all domains where I claim deep experience; they are areas where I am actively building expertise and looking for projects.
